7.2.14.en: v7.2.14: Nexus Awakening stabilization — Repaired 289 drivers, fixed SOS button and Radiator Controller crashes, resolved ASI bugs in flow registration. Added support for Shenzen New Green Energy temp/hum sensors (_TZE284_8se38w3c) thanks to @pemikalsen-sudo, and improved CK-BL702 energy plug support thanks to @john1v.

7.2.9.en: v7.2.9: Nexus Awakening — Stabilized radar presence, added smart humidity auto-correction, and hardened CI/CD for SDK 3 compliance.
